name: Pre-commit Lint & Format Check
description: Runs ESLint and Prettier checks before any file write to catch issues early

then.prompt: Before writing this file, verify: (1) The code follows the conventions in .cursor/rules/ — check stack constraints, NestJS/Next.js patterns, and observability guardrails. (2) If this is a scenario handler, confirm it emits all three signals: Prometheus metric, structured log with scenario_id and scenario_type, and Sentry for system_error. (3) If this is a React component, confirm it uses shadcn/ui components and TanStack Query (not useEffect+fetch). Report any violations before proceeding.
